_comment: Machine-readable task manifest, mirroring state/fix_plan.md. JSON on purpose: the model is less likely to inappropriately rewrite a JSON manifest than Markdown, which makes 'passes' a sturdier done-guardrail. /plan populates this; the loop may edit ONLY the 'passes' field, never 'description'/'acceptance'. Enumerate granularly so the loop can't declare premature victory.

tasks.description: Example task — replace via /plan. Describes ONE shippable unit of work.
tasks.acceptance: The single, verifiable condition that makes this true. Prefer executable.
